<style="header_35">Warning!</style>\n\n The Open Campaign Mode is meant for advanced players who would like to enjoy an unrestricted gameplay experience without any guidelines or story driven content. This game mode assumes that you have completed the Story Campaign and will contain potential story "spoilers". You will be able to choose your starting biome, however, some starting locations are much more difficult to survive in. You will not receive any additional help and you will have to "figure things out" on your own.
You need to have a functioning <style="inventory_orange_36">laboratory building</style> to progress alien research.
